Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 16
STR: +5 STA: +5 CHA: -9
WT: 7.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: HUM ERU HEF FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

AC: 16
STR: +5 STA: +5 CHA: -9
WT: 7.5 Size: MEDIUM

This item is found on creatures.

Gorge of King Xorbb (Beholder's Maze)
NPC Name

# May 22 2003 at 7:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257834365
18 posts
just today i killed around 20 a minotaur slavers and gorehorn. plus, ive been killing them ever since level 8 and now im level 12 probably killed over 100 of them. do the steamfront ones drop this or is it really really rare? if it's rare, then around how many do i have t kill to get one? give me an estimate. thanks

Edited, Fri Jun 13 16:37:28 2003

don't think you would be able to get in L guk of the elder at your level; otherwise that would have been your best bet, me thinks

▲ Page top
Found in EK
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2002 at 10:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781129204
View User Forum
1 post
After BB server crashed and went back on last night, a level 13 Druid and myself (Ranger 17 then) came across Yymp the Infernal. I saw him on tracking first, and thought it was a strange name. Tracked him down, and he dropped the Minotaur Ribcage. Pretty easy kill if you are lucky enough to find him.
▲ Page top
There is a sheild too
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2002 at 1:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777189608
42 posts
We were given a sheild that looks very similar to this minotaur ribcage, and sold it off without writing down the name of it.... it was a something ribcage, but not the Minotaur Ribcage. I went in search of the sheild, both here on this website (with no luck) and looking in Beholder's maze. I came out with the breastplate, but no sign of the sheild. The sheild has similar stats, (again didn't write them down) but has a negative 15 to charisma in addition too two other plus stats. The sheild looks pretty cool, sold it right off his arm. If anyone knows the name of the sheild, I would be interested. thx.
▲ Page top

Shield
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 1:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245741571
45 posts
It's a shield, actually, you wear it on your arm =)

Note : be careful if you drop this item, due to its texture having some weird alpha channel it can't be picked up if dropped. Fortunately, last I heard GMs will reimburse this if they see in their records you dropped it (and haven't gotten it back since ^_~)

solo

9 posts
This Item drops of any Minotaur in Belholder's Maze. I was camping the Eyes for Braclets and fight Minotaurs on a regular basis, I walked out with 3 Ribcages and 2 Braclets in 2 hours

RE: solo
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 9:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252328795
149 posts

# Aug 03 2001 at 9:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763610128

I just got this last night on Ayonae Ro. I am a Paladin and I was lev 19 when Yymp popped up. I said WTF? I conned and he was blue so I whacked him and he had the ribcage on him. Better armor than what I had so I'm keeping it. I'll just remove it when I do Vendor negotiations.

#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 06 2001 at 11:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) pwwwwooooor thing :~(

QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2001 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249352913
60 posts
I was hunting with a nice young half elven Warrior (she looked awesome, I tell you), when Yymp jumped on me. He was low blue or high green to me at Level 20 and we killed him easily. Now I got a Ribcage.

By the way, it looks exactly like banded armor.
▲ Page top
Yymp's Placeholder
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2001 at 2:03 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Seems nobody has answered this, until now. His placeholder is a simple goblin lookout. Whack the greeny, sit and wait, repeat step 1 if necessary, then kill Yymp when he spawns. First time I saw him I got the ribcage. Spawn of the cage seems to be around that of Polished Bone Bracelets, but everything on the Tarew Marr server is screwed up :P

Kamilie
Level 18 Bard of Tunare
Celestial Companions
▲ Page top
RE: Yymp's Placeholder
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2001 at 11:28 AM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,344 posts
I was standing near Runnyeye repeatedly killing the 3 goblins that spawn there, and after a while I was jumped by Yymp. So maybe one or all three of those goblins are a placeholder for him.
▲ Page top
Price / Rarity
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 12:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760137454
99 posts
One of the reasons the price is High is due to the Rarity of the Item. I also hear it has a cool graphic when worn.
So for those of you who don't care about looks and just about stats, then this piece is not for you.

# May 23 2001 at 12:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755823437
28 posts
Umm. Isn't the AC on the crafted BP 22 +5sta, +25hps? Not that it matter's cuz this post is not for the CRAFTED BP.. So don't post crap here about something that is irrelivant(sp)..
Not a bad item fer a noob or a poor twink.. :-)


Wolvbane
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 4:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This does kind off suck im a ranger and i wouldnt have this i also believe IF YOU ARE A BARD never buy this it has minus 9 to cha bards need cha!
better than crafted???
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 6:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248378773
7 posts
Hey! the guy who said this is better than a crafted BP is an idiot, I have a lvl 31 warrior and I would much rather have ac than stats and most ppl that play would agree with me. AC is the main stat for warriors. Crafted BP has 25 ac this only has a measly 16! bronze is a better BP than this for ac. Its great for rangers and rogues that cant use plate armor but otherwise i wouldent use this. Unless of course you can afford a better one.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 1:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) to be exact it has 22ac:) dont be fool'd by typing error or dumass's whichever the case..heh
#Anonymous, Posted: May 12 2001 at 8:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WRONG!only 21 ac to be exact
#Anonymous, Posted: May 29 2001 at 8:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your the one who's wrong. It's 22 ac dumbass, not 21
newbies
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2001 at 10:35 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
For all you newbies out there that did not know this, AC is better then ANY stat for a melee class. Not much use for this item at higher levels. I would NEVER pay over 200pp for this, if you pay for more, you just got ripped.
▲ Page top
RE: newbies

# Jul 05 2001 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent

Shadow Knights
▲ Page top
I have a idea
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2001 at 12:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756269110
4 posts
After they have a patch they reset the servers, So right after a patch get to beholder if not already there, and kill him, this means that if they reset it all rare spawns should be up.
▲ Page top
Yymp
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2001 at 12:29 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591753210066
5 posts
He floated by near the mino spawn on the right fork from the EK crossroads, underneath that rock bridge you can med on. He conned blue to me at 18, and 2 of us (18 and 19 ranger) took him pretty easily, despite being swarmed by minotaur and a couple of muddies.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 30 2001 at 11:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WHO THE HELL PRICED IT AT 50 PP YOUR ON CRACK WHO EVER YOU ARE IT IS SO RARE THAT IVE ONLY SEEN 2 YMPS THE INFERNAL IN 2 YEARS PLAYING DUDE AND IT IS A BETTER BP THEN CRAFTED FOR SURE PLUS 5 STR AND STA WHO CARES ABOUT - 9 CHA WE ARE TANKS ITS WORTH MORE THEN A CRAFTED BP THX MUVASI OF HOUSE BLADESNAPPER SOL RO SERVER

# Dec 21 2000 at 10:29 AM Rating: Default

Does anyone know for certain what the placeholder for Yymp is? I have heard that he spwawns just outside the Runnyeye Zone in the Gorge, but have been there a week with a ranger and not seen him once!...

Manigprod
Ranger of SureFall Glade

RE: Yymp: Placeholder(s)?
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 2:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361375907
3 posts
I've only been hunting in the Gorge for 2 days and ran into Yymp twice ( the same one ). I'm a lvl 14 warrior and curiously enough it claimed he was invulnerable. I found him near the runnyeye entrance side of the gorge and he ambushed me in the middle later again as I was taking down a Muddite.
▲ Page top

I've hunted in Beholder for over 3 months and I've never seen him.....EVER...
▲ Page top
RE: Yymp: Placeholder(s)?
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 3:21 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751437183
View User Forum
Scholar
151 posts
No clue about if he has a place holder or not, but tonight my RL girlfriend and I were hunting at the crossroads of the East Karana entrance, and Yymp jumped onto my back out of nowhere when I stuck my head down the center (North) passage- nowhere near Runnyeye.

Of course, there were a couple of other pairs of players hunting other parts of the zone that night, and they trained us a couple of times, so Yymp COULD have been a leftover backwash, but I kinda doubt it-- he moves too dang fast.
▲ Page top
RE: Yymp: Placeholder(s)?
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2001 at 6:58 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591749893869
Sage
196 posts
I believe Yymp is simply a rare spawn, and the fork near EK zone is where I hear he spawns. Independently matching reports make me assume that is true.
